description:
## Problem
The `FaviconStorage` module (lines 422-461) is a pure delegation wrapper with 9 methods, each a one-liner calling `FaviconActor`. It exists only for backward compatibility with callers that have not been updated to use `FaviconActor` directly.

This is 40 lines of dead weight that adds indirection without value.

## Steps
1. Find all callers of `FaviconStorage.*` across the codebase
2. Update each caller to use `FaviconActor.*` instead (e.g., `FaviconStorage.save_favicon(...)` → `FaviconActor.instance.save_favicon(...)`)
3. Remove the `FaviconStorage` module entirely
4. Remove `alias` or `require` references if any

## Depends on
- DRY1 (extract HTTP fetch helper) — do structural cleanup last

## Verification
- `grep -r "FaviconStorage" src/` returns 0 results
- `just nix-build` passes

## File
`src/favicon_storage.cr` (lines 422-461) and all caller files
title: Remove FaviconStorage backward-compat wrapper module
